'''Zabba II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Zabba system/Legends|Zabba system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and
said to house the [[Cursed Palace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
